response.justification: Sarah demonstrates strong full-stack and tooling experience, with some exposure to C++ and embedded systems, but lacks recent, in-depth C++ development, industrial automation, or secure engineering practices aligned with IEC 62443 standards.
strengths: Diverse technical background with exposure to C++, DLang, and low-latency systems.
Strong problem-solving and mentorship experience through workshops and talks.
Proven ability to work across the stack, including AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling.
concerns: Limited recent, hands-on C++ development experience in industrial or automation contexts.
No explicit mention of secure development lifecycle (SDL) or IEC 62443 cybersecurity expertise.
Primary expertise lies in web, mobile, and full-stack technologies rather than embedded or industrial automation.
